features.Key Features:: This case for anti-oxidation,anti-deterioration,anti-corrosion,anti-fungus and anti-aging. | LED Digital display humidity 25~60%RH. | Suitable for cameras, lenses, memory cards, video cameras, telescopes, photographs, slides, CDs, DVDs. | Material: 0.8-1.0 thick cold-rolled steel. | Have 2pcs key. | Removable steel shelf board and can movable up and down to your need position. | Adjustable front feet.
